command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Miqjapjuirru1Z.b9867fc13f8f --database boyWMBM5odtbpptCLrtK7n --execute 
SELECT id, expenseDate, amount, targetType FROM expenses 
WHERE headId = 120003 AND deletedAt IS NULL;

-- Also check ALL expenses for Beef Calf category since Jun 13
SELECT id, expenseDate, amount, targetType, categoryTarget, headId FROM expenses 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND expenseDate >= '2026-06-13'
ORDER BY expenseDate DESC;
